tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall address
config firewall address
    edit "none"
        set uuid 4b93780e-2aaa-51f1-661c-400dbb1190b1show firewall policy


        set subnet 0.0.0.0 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "login.microsoftonline.com"
        set uuid 4b937f98-2aaa-51f1-ba50-9e269099a44c
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.microsoftonline.com"
    next
    edit "login.microsoft.com"
        set uuid 4b9386a0-2aaa-51f1-3479-d72cd658c9ea
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.microsoft.com"
    next
    edit "login.windows.net"
        set uuid 4b938b82-2aaa-51f1-9651-5c969472a928
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.windows.net"
    next
    edit "gmail.com"
        set uuid 4b93906e-2aaa-51f1-6ce0-e362e47da6e0
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "gmail.com"
next
    edit "wildcard.google.com"
        set uuid 4b939532-2aaa-51f1-d740-402806da042b
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "*.google.com"
    next
    edit "wildcard.dropbox.com"
        set uuid 4b939a00-2aaa-51f1-57bc-c5df07b8957b
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "*.dropbox.com"
    next
    edit "all"
        set uuid 4cc9d646-2aaa-51f1-f874-eaa5ad2f756b
    next
    edit "FIREWALL_AUTH_PORTAL_ADDRESS"
        set uuid 4cc9d8ee-2aaa-51f1-48b3-d0af865bf9e3
    next
    edit "FABRIC_DEVICE"
        set uuid 4cc9dd62-2aaa-51f1-2394-79a4d795a23f
        set comment "IPv4 addresses of Fabric Devices."
    next
    edit "SSLVPN_TUNNEL_ADDR1"
        set uuid 4cca9c16-2aaa-51f1-9e6e-812d9da92f73
        set type iprange
set start-ip 10.212.134.200
        set end-ip 10.212.134.210
    next
    edit "LAN_subnet"
        set uuid 86c374ba-2aaa-51f1-9136-a3a9e06535af
        set subnet 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0
    next
    edit "Caldera_Server"
        set uuid 86c6a2ca-2aaa-51f1-ea6e-ee47e9103dd9
        set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "FCTEMS_ALL_FORTICLOUD_SERVERS"
        set uuid 929f02e0-2aaa-51f1-9434-6b57c1417ba1
        set type dynamic
        set sub-type ems-tag
    next
    edit "Allowed-HTTP"
        set uuid 7aee2e14-2ac8-51f1-178e-3b124bc0529f
        set subnet 1.1.1.1 255.255.255.255
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM # ow firewall policy
Unknown action 0

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    delete 100
    delete 101
    delete 102
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-HTTP-to-Allowed-Host"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "LAN_subnet"
        set dstaddr "Allowed-HTTP"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 101
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Allow-Ping"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "LAN_subnet"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 102
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Deny-HTTPS"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "LAN_subnet"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS"
    next
end
show firewall policy
show firewall address"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     delete 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     delete 101

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     delete 102

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 100
new entry '100' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (100) #         set name "LAN-to-WAN-HTTP-to-Allowed-Host"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (100) #         set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (100) #         set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (100) #         set action accept

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (100) #         set srcaddr "LAN_subnet"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (100) #         set dstaddr "Allowed-HTTP"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (100) #         set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (100) #         set service "HTTP"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (100) #         set nat enable

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (100) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 101
new entry '101' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) #         set name "LAN-to-WAN-Allow-Ping"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) #         set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) #         set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) #         set action accept

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) #         set srcaddr "LAN_subnet"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) #         set dstaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) #         set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) #         set service "PING"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) #         set nat enable

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 102
new entry '102' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (102) #         set name "LAN-to-WAN-Deny-HTTPS"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (102) #         set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (102) #         set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (102) #         set action deny

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (102) #         set srcaddr "LAN_subnet"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (102) #         set dstaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (102) #         set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (102) #         set service "HTTPS"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (102) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-HTTP-to-Allowed-Host"
        set uuid 8e2b22b6-2ac8-51f1-6c2a-5d5de66f9398
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "LAN_subnet"
        set dstaddr "Allowed-HTTP"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 101
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Allow-Ping"
        set uuid 8e3993b4-2ac8-51f1-ebe2-89f035fadb4d
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "LAN_subnet"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set nat enable
next
    edit 102
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Deny-HTTPS"
        set uuid 8e46ff68-2ac8-51f1-3451-d955fb2ccbda
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "LAN_subnet"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall address
